_doc: GitHub Ruleset for the anchor/* tag namespace. Apply per caller repo via: gh api -X POST /repos/<owner>/<repo>/rulesets --input docs/canary-tag-ruleset.json. Replace <BYPASS_ACTOR_ID> with either: (a) your organization-admin role id, or (b) a team id whose only member is you. Individual user-level bypass is not supported by rulesets; the bypass actor must be a role, team, integration, or deploy key.
name: history-canary-anchors
